answers.browser_team_builder_currently_decides_c: script.js:getActiveStageEligibleTeams, recordMatchesActiveStageEligibleTeam, playerHasActiveMatchdayProjection, and playerAllowedForActiveMatchday gate renderPlayerPicker, availableFillCandidates, optimizerPriceFloorsByPosition, optimizerCandidatePools, locked-player validation, and portfolio analytics.
answers.validators_currently_decide_eligibility: scripts/validateFinalRoundEligiblePlayersV1.mjs, scripts/validateTeamBuilderGoldenFinalRoundV1.mjs, and scripts/validateFinalRoundBrowserContentContractV1.mjs had fixture-authority team extraction/checks; the new scripts/validateTeamBuilderEligibilityHelpersV1.mjs validates shared helper behavior directly.
answers.rules_identical: Now yes for fixture-authority teams and active projection availability. Downstream risk, price, lock, trust, country, and optimizer filters remain separate and unchanged.
answers.hardcoded_rules: Production eligibility does not hardcode eligible teams. Validator/golden assertions intentionally freeze France, England, Spain, Argentina and Brazil/Colombia block examples.
answers.historical_fallback: Active Final Round Team Builder eligibility requires an active finalRound projection and admits no historical fallback candidates.
answers.fantasy_points_proxy: Eligibility does not use fantasy points as a proxy for starter status.
answers.eliminated_blocking_source: Eliminated teams are blocked by fixture authority eligibility; string blocklists remain validator assertions for known regression examples.
answers.safe_to_extract_now: Pure fixture-authority normalization, active projection availability, candidate eligibility decision/explanation, candidate filtering, and no-eliminated-candidate assertion helpers.

safe_extractions_completed.logic: fixture-authority eligible team and fixture-team extraction
safe_extractions_completed.why_safe: Reads fixture authority only and replaces duplicate team extraction in browser and validators.
Uses the same identity keys already used by the browser, with eligible teams still derived from fixture authority.

safe_extractions_completed.why_safe: Requires projection.available !== false and matchday/matchday_id equal the active stage.

safe_extractions_completed.why_safe: Combines only fixture-authority team eligibility and active projection availability; scoring and optimizer ordering remain untouched.

rollback_plan: Restore local fixture-authority and projection eligibility logic in script.js.
Remove the new eligibility helper exports from scripts/lib/teamBuilderPublicModel.mjs and teamBuilderPublicHelpers.js.
Undo validator imports that call shared eligibility helpers.
Remove scripts/validateTeamBuilderEligibilityHelpersV1.mjs from the active-stage manifest command and syntax checks.
Remove the generated eligibility QA, audit, and no-behavior-change proof files.
